text: I'm really struggling to understand how to use your app properly. I've tried to figure it out, but it feels overwhelming and I just want to know if there’s a simple guide or something that could help me out. It's really frustrating because I thought it would be easier to use, and I'm just lost. Can someone please point me in the right direction?

I've been trying to get clarity on your cancellation policy, but it's really confusing. It seems every time I think I understand, I find new terms that just leave me feeling lost. Can someone please help clear this up? I’m worried about being charged unexpectedly.

Hey, so I can't get my app to work at all, but it seems fine when I use it on my tablet? What’s the deal? It's definitely not an issue with my phone, it’s just that it was working perfectly 2 days ago and now it won’t even load! So odd.
The app crashes when I try to open it, but I don’t remember what I was doing before.
What time does the store close on Sundays?

Dear Support Team, I seem to be experiencing an issue with my account, but I am not quite sure what is wrong. There might be something wrong with my login details or perhaps something else entirely. Could you please assist me in determining the exact problem? Thank you for your help.
my app wont open, keeps crashing. help plz
I recently received a shirt that was several sizes too small. I would like to request a refund rather than exchange it. Thank you for your assistance in processing this.
I can't access my account. Also, my dog just had a birthday. Can you help?

Dear Customer Support, I am experiencing a technical issue where the application crashes every time I attempt to log in. This has been happening for the last two days. Could you please assist me in resolving this matter? Thank you.

I placed an order over a week ago that claimed it would arrive in 2 days, but I still haven’t seen it. I even checked the tracking number provided, and it shows that it was delivered, which doesn’t make any sense because I’m still waiting for it to arrive! It’s frustrating to see that the tracking says one thing, but my experience tells a completely different story. Can you please provide some clarity on this? I really need this item ASAP, and I thought the shipping would be reliable based on your promise, yet here we are! What’s going on?
Hey, quick question. What’s the deal with getting help? I can't find the info I need.
hey, I cant log into my account. it says my password is wrong but I just changed it yesturday! pls help!
Hey there, I really need to know if there's a way to get some help with an issue that has been bothering me. Just feeling really lost with the whole thing.
I would like to request a refund for my recent purchase.
I can't believe this! My app just crashes every time I try to upload a photo! It’s so frustrating! What is happening? I really need it to work.
